azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.events'
| extend Properties=parse_json(Properties), event_name=tostring(Properties['event.name']), workflow_type=tostring(Properties['workflow.type'])
| where event_name == 'document.uploaded'
| summarize value=sum(todouble(Sum)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m), workflow_type
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.events'
| extend Properties=parse_json(Properties), event_name=tostring(Properties['event.name'])
| where event_name in ('extraction.completed', 'extraction.failed', 'indexing.completed', 'indexing.failed')
| summarize value=sum(todouble(Sum)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m), event_name
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppMetrics
| where Name in ('researchops.extraction.duration_ms', 'researchops.indexing.duration_ms')
| extend value = iff(todouble(ItemCount) > 0, todouble(Sum) / todouble(ItemCount), todouble(Sum))
| summarize avg(value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m), Name
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.queue.backlog'
| extend Properties=parse_json(Properties), queue=tostring(Properties['queue.name']), status=tostring(Properties['queue.status']), value=iff(todouble(ItemCount) > 0, todouble(Sum) / todouble(ItemCount), todouble(Sum))
| summarize avg(value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), queue, status
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.events'
| extend Properties=parse_json(Properties), event_name=tostring(Properties['event.name'])
| where event_name in ('document.question_asked', 'document.question_failed')
| summarize value=sum(todouble(Sum)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m), event_name
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppMetrics
| where Name == 'researchops.events'
| extend Properties=parse_json(Properties), event_name=tostring(Properties['event.name']), missing_fields=tostring(Properties['missing_fields'])
| where event_name == 'extraction.completed' and missing_fields != ''
| mv-expand missing_field=split(missing_fields, ',')
| summarize value=count() by missing_field=tostring(missing_field)
| order by value desc
